title: Debiāpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Debiāpur with a Z-Score of +5.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Debiāpur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 33% and the wind speed is 5.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Debiāpur.
